privileged_info_summary: The task loads a real Unsplash photograph (photo-1513475382585-d06e58bcb0e0, 1000x667 pixels, JPEG) with a confirmed warm color cast (R/B ratio 1.470). The primary download URL in the setup script fails (404), but a fallback URL successfully provides the image. The verifier checks white balance correction by measuring color temperature shift toward neutral (R/B ratio toward 1.0), RGB channel balance improvement (≥10% deviation reduction), and pixel-level changes (≥15% of pixels modified by ≥15 intensity units). Pass threshold requires 3 of 4 criteria met. No metadata field exists in task.json to audit.
